# The Forest - AI-Readable Content Index

The Forest is a luxury golf estate by ABL Group in Teski Village, Sikhri Tehsil, Deeg District, Rajasthan. The site is positioned around seclusion, executive golf, wellness, water-led landscape, and generational value.

## Core messages
- The Forest is not built for moments. It is built for generations.
- About 2 hours from Delhi, deeper in nature.
- Premium estate living with a meaningful value advantage versus comparable Gurgaon golf estates.
- Executive 9-hole golf and night golf positioning.
- Founding Member Program for early buyers.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://the-forest.online/) - The Forest luxury golf estate landing page
- [Pricing](https://the-forest.online/#pricing) - Plot categories, sizes, and price ranges
- [Founding Member Program](https://the-forest.online/#founding) - Early buyer benefits and discounts
- [Amenities](https://the-forest.online/#amenities) - Golf course, sports, spa, wellness, clubhouse
- [Location](https://the-forest.online/#location) - Teski Village, Rajasthan — 2 hours from Delhi
- [Contact](https://the-forest.online/#contact) - Inquiry form and contact details

## Location
- Teski Village, Sikhri Tehsil, Deeg District, Rajasthan
- Delhi-Mumbai Expressway corridor
- About 2 hours from Delhi

## Plot categories
| Category | Size | Price |
|----------|------|-------|
| Estate Plots | 500–1000 sq.yd | ₹50L – 1 Cr |
| Premium Estate | 1000–2000 sq.yd | ₹1 Cr – 2.4 Cr |
| Large Estate | 2000–4000 sq.yd | ₹2.4 Cr – 6 Cr |
| Farmhouse Plots | Private estate land | ₹3 Cr – 10 Cr+ |

## Amenities and lifestyle
- Executive golf
- Night golf and practice range
- Sports and fitness
- Spa and wellness
- Clubhouse
- Water-led landscape

## Founding Member Program
- First 10 plots: 20% below launch price
- Next 15 plots: 15% below launch price
- Next 25 plots: 10% below launch price

## Contact
- Phone: +91 98765 43210
- Email: info@theforest.in
- Website: https://the-forest.online
